ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title of the employee */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employment status of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the employee */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account information for payroll */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of responsibilities associated with the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the job title belongs to */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary for the job title */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary for the job title */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Level of the job title (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment status (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the status became effective */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Rating assigned to the employee's performance */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the employee's performance */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the evaluation */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  "performance_plan" TEXT /* Performance improvement plan, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., sick, vacation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request (approved, pending, denied) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days of the leave */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, HR Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee whose record was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of what was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or section where the change was made */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
